title: ElasticSearch Type Mapping has _all in wrong place
description: _all should be moved to a child of 'entity'

title: Fix NoAwsCreds rule to work outside of core.
description: The no aws creds rule call doesn't work outside of core. It fails in service and rest when using the one based in core.

title: Remove Fields and Map to Entity Conversions from Core
description: we convert from a map to entity and back 2 - 3 times for every read and write.  We should remove these type conversions
